'''Hapes: Ladies First''' was a web publication from [[May]] [[2004]] in the [[Wizards.com]] ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' series, covering [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]]. The four articles were written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] and published by [[Wizards of the Coast]].

==Contents==
===Part 1: Planet of the Amazons===
''…a pirate-turned-author recalls a fateful shortcut through the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]].''<ref name="Hapes" />

===Part 2: Return to the Planet of the Amazons===
''…the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] prisoners explore ''[[Star Home]]'', flagship of the [[Queen Mother|Queen of Hapes]].''<ref name="Hapes" />

===Part 3: Beneath the Planet of the Amazons===
''…our pirate heroes endure interrogation by [[Ta'a Chume]] in her underground dungeon.''<ref name="Hapes" />

===Part 4: Escape from the Planet of the Amazons===
''…two pirate prisoners face execution on trumped-up charges of crimes against [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]].''<ref name="Hapes" />
